payload.answer: Committed durable memories about Sam's employment change and music interests. The AI infra catch-up is treated as a discussion interest with lower confidence.
citations: Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: The transcript identifies Sam as the speaker and subject of the memory updates, but no existing entity identifier is provided.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam is interested in catching up about AI infra.

details: Recorded that Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Recorded that Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has recently been listening more to early Coltrane.
